raw_title: Improve operational visibility for inference workloads on Amazon Bedrock with new CloudWatch metrics for TTFT and Estimated Quota Consumption
raw_content: Today, we’re announcing two new Amazon CloudWatch metrics for Amazon Bedrock, TimeToFirstToken and EstimatedTPMQuotaUsage. In this post, we cover how these work and how to set alarms, establish baselines, and proactively manage capacity using them.
